title: STDrug enables spatially informed personalized drug repurposing from spatial transcriptomics.
publicationName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
journalName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
snippet: Drug repurposing offers a scalable route to accelerate therapeutic discovery, yet existing approaches based on single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) often overlook spatial tissue context, limiting their ability to capture microenvironment-dependent drug responses. Here we present, a spatially informed computational framework that integrates spatial transcr...
